title: Spicy Crusty Coconut Crumble
description: A Mediterranean-inspired solo-dinner dish featuring shredded coconut blended with a spicy twist for a crispy texture and mediterranean-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: spice blend (e.g. cayenne pepper, smoked paprika)

instructions: Mix shredded coconut, dijon mustard, spice blend, unsalted butter, and sugar until well combined.
Transfer the mixture onto a greased baking sheet. Spread it out evenly with a spatula for even cooking.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.
